{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Lindon's badge
| introduced = Soulsmith
}}

== Soulsmith ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Lindon]] possesses a badge with an empty character in the center.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c8">''Soulsmith'', chapter 8</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Soulsmith]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
